= CouchbaseRoleBinding Resource

:resource-name-singular: couchbaserolebinding

== couchbaserolebindings.spec

=== Constraints

*Required*

*Type*: `object`

=== Description

CouchbaseRoleBindingSpec defines the group of subjects i.e.
users, and the role i.e.
group they are a member of.

=== couchbaserolebindings.spec.roleRef

==== Constraints

*Required*

*Type*: `object`

==== Description

CouchbaseGroup being bound to subjects.

=== couchbaserolebindings.spec.roleRef.kind

==== Constraints

*Required*

*Type*: `string`

*Enumerations*: `CouchbaseGroup`

==== Description

Kind of role to use for binding.

=== couchbaserolebindings.spec.roleRef.name

==== Constraints

*Required*

*Type*: `string`

==== Description

Name of role resource to use for binding.

=== couchbaserolebindings.spec.subjects

==== Constraints

*Required*

*Type*: `[]object`

==== Description

List of users to bind a role to.

=== couchbaserolebindings.spec.subjects.kind

==== Constraints

*Required*

*Type*: `string`

*Enumerations*: `CouchbaseUser`

==== Description

Couchbase user/group kind.

=== couchbaserolebindings.spec.subjects.name

==== Constraints
